name: joplin-notes-pro
description: Comprehensive OpenClaw skill for managing Joplin notes via CLI with wrapper scripts and common workflows
author: Jörg Lang <joergbot@gmail.com>

skill.name: joplin-notes-pro
skill.description: Manage Joplin notes via CLI (v3.5.1). Use when the user asks to create, read, edit, list, delete, sync, tag, or organize notes and notebooks in Joplin. Triggers on keywords like "joplin", "note", "notiz", "notizbuch", "notebook", "note erstellen", "notiz erstellen", "notes verwalten". Joplin is an interactive REPL tool—commands are sent inside the REPL session or piped via stdin.
